---
title: "muninn_heart.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/muninn_heart.py"
loc: 80
complexity: 11
logic_score: 2.17
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 5.40
overall_score: 4.50
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating MuninnHeart, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import MuninnHeart and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [os](file://os)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.metrics](file://src.core.metrics)
- [src.sentinel.stability](file://src.sentinel.stability)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_hunter](file://src.sentinel.muninn_hunter)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_crucible](file://src.sentinel.muninn_crucible)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_memory](file://src.sentinel.muninn_memory)

### Exports
- `MuninnHeart`
- `__init__`
- `_wait_for_silence`
- `execute_cycle`
